description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body and rounded ends, supported by a wooden stand. The barrel is constructed from light-colored wooden staves, held together by several dark metal hoops that encircle its body. One end features a wooden spigot for dispensing liquids, while the opposite end is plain and closed. The wood grain is visible, giving the barrel a rustic and traditional appearance, and the metal bands provide structural reinforcement. The stand elevates the barrel slightly off the ground, making it suitable for easy access and pouring. This type of barrel is commonly used for storing and aging beverages such as wine, whiskey, or beer in urban or commercial settings.
description: A wooden barrel with dark metal hoops, a spigot, and a wooden stand, featuring visible wood grain and a rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end of the barrel with a wooden spigot and the supporting stand.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the metal hoops, and the wooden stand beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, closed end of the barrel and the supporting stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with the spigot handle partially visible.
